badgeView.description: View of a badge record, with fields resolved for display. If the DID in issuer is not the current streamplace node, the signature field shall be required.

signature.description: TODO: Cryptographic signature of the badge (of a place.stream.key).

mod.description: This user is a moderator. Displayed with a sword icon.

streamer.description: This user is the streamer. Displayed with a star icon.

vip.description: This user is a very important person.
